title: All of Modrinth
body: --- ## 📦 Description **AOM** aims to become Modrinth’s most comprehensive and truly useful **kitchen sink** modpack! Rather than cramming in every mod available, AOM focuses on delivering a massive yet stable collection of content that works together seamlessly. While **99% of the included mods come directly from Modrinth**, a small handful from CurseForge are included solely to improve the overall player experience where necessary. The result? A feature-rich, expansive modpack that offers endless possibilities without sacrificing performance or stability.
